title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google has released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, served via Virgo Network infrastructure. The video compares these ASICs against general-purpose NVIDIA GPUs and analyzes scaling strategies and their economic impact on token costs and LLM serving.
